wines.name: Barons de Rothschild Blanc de Blancs
wines.taste: Delicate pear and macaron with a lightly reductive smokiness, sweet apricot, and almond character with hints of brioche crumb.

wines.name: Gran Enemigo Gualtallary Single Vineyard Cabernet Franc
wines.taste: Blackberry, plum, mountain herbs, violet, and lavender with chalky tannins and vibrant acidity.

wines.name: Zenato "Sergio Zenato" Amarone della Valpolicella Classico Riserva
wines.taste: Baked black cherry, macerated strawberry, singed orange peel, and medicinal herbs with fine-grained tannins.

wines.name: Tommaso Bussola "TB" Amarone della Valpolicella Classico Riserva
wines.taste: Kirsch, wood smoke, and sandalwood with heavy mocha and cocoa notes from the oak.

wines.name: Circumference Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.taste: Plums, mocha, and spiced tea with broad, sturdy tannins and a cedary finish.
wines.notes: Pretty simple wine, not much complexity.

wines.name: Clos de Napa Cellars Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.taste: Sweet fruits, dark cherry, black berries, licorice, graphite, silky tannins, blueberries, loam
wines.notes: Easy to drink, simple (not much complexity).

wines.name: Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Artemis Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.taste: Full bodied, boysenberry, blackcurrant, subtle baking spice, velvety tannins

wines.name: Introvert Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.taste: Dark plum, cassis (black currant), dried cherry, tart raspberry, toasted oak, vanilla, clove, hints of black olive and dark chocolate. Dry, medium- to full-bodied with moderate tannins and a smooth finish.
wines.notes: Easy to drink, simple (not much complexity).
